name: Sugar-Free Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (240 ml) frozen apple juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the frozen apple juice concentrate, flour, cinnamon, and salt. Stir constantly over medium heat until the mixture is thick and bubbly, about 3 to 5 minutes.
2. Add the sliced apples to the saucepan and stir until combined with the apple juice mixture.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell. Dot the top with butter.
4. Place the top crust on the filling, cutting slits for steam to escape. Trim and seal the edges.
5. Brush the top lightly with water and sprinkle with nutmeg if desired.
6. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for 15 minutes. Reduce the heat to 350°F (177°C) and bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Serves 6-8
Source: The Kansas Cookbook - Recipes from the Heartland
